All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

C

Canvas - Class in BusinessLayer
Canvas class represents the drawing area where components and connectors (wires) are placed and interacted with.
Canvas(Circuit) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Constructs a Canvas with the given circuit.
Circuit - Class in BusinessLayer
Represents a digital circuit with components and connectors.
Circuit() - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Default constructor.
Circuit(String) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Constructs a circuit with a given name.
CircuitExplorer - Class in UserInterfaceLayer
A panel that provides a user interface for exploring, creating, removing, saving, and reusing circuits within a Project.
CircuitExplorer(Project, Canvas) - Constructor for class UserInterfaceLayer.CircuitExplorer
Creates a CircuitExplorer panel for the given project and canvas.
circuitList - Variable in class UserInterfaceLayer.CircuitExplorer
The list component displaying circuit names.
circuitModel - Variable in class UserInterfaceLayer.CircuitExplorer
The model backing the circuit list.
clearCanvas() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Clears the entire canvas and resets dragging state.
clearList() - Method in class UserInterfaceLayer.CircuitExplorer
Clears all circuits from the list model.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.AND
Creates and returns a deep copy of this AND component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Component
Creates a deep copy of this component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.LED
Creates a copy of this LED component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.NAND
Creates and returns a deep copy of this NAND component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.NOR
Creates and returns a deep copy of this NOR component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.NOT
Creates and returns a deep copy of this NOT component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.OR
Creates and returns a deep copy of this OR component.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Switch
Creates a clone of this switch, including its state and selection status.
cloneComponent() - Method in class BusinessLayer.XOR
Creates a copy of this XOR gate.
cloneConnector(Pin, Pin) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Clones the connector and connects it to new pins.
clonePin(Component) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Pin
Creates and returns a copy of this pin for a new owner component.
Component - Class in BusinessLayer
Abstract base class for all circuit components.
Component(int, int) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Component
Constructs a component at a given position.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.AND
Computes the logical AND of the two input pins and sets the output pin value accordingly.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Component
Compute output values based on input values.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.LED
Computes the LED's state based on its input pin value.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.NAND
Computes the logical NAND of the two input pins and sets the output pin value accordingly.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.NOR
Computes the logical NOR of the two input pins and sets the output pin value accordingly.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.NOT
Computes the logical NOT of the input pin and sets the output pin value accordingly.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.OR
Computes the logical OR of the two input pins and sets the output pin value accordingly.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Switch
Updates the output pin value to match the switch state.
compute() - Method in class BusinessLayer.XOR
Computes the XOR logic for this gate.
Connector - Class in BusinessLayer
Represents a wire connecting two component pins in a circuit.
Connector(int, int) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Connector
Constructs a connector starting at a given point with a default length.
connectToPin(Pin, boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Connects this wire to a pin at one end.
contains(Point) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Component
Checks if a given point is within the component bounds (with a small padding).
containsEnd(int, int) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Checks if a point is within 8px of the end point.
containsLine(int, int) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Checks if a point is approximately on the line of the connector (for whole-wire drag).
containsStart(int, int) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Checks if a point is within 8px of the start point.
createCenterCanvas() - Static method in class UserInterfaceLayer.MainWindow
Creates a central design panel with a titled border.
createNewCircuit() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Creates a new circuit named "Circuit 1" and sets it as the current circuit.
